display_information.name: Hermes — MOR Code Review
display_information.description: Engineering mentor: GitHub PR review, code audit, fix templates, Hermes ↔ MOR collab

assistant_view.assistant_description: Hermes reviews repo code from GitHub webhooks and PR context. Outputs REVIEW, OPTIMIZE, TEMPLATE — never auto-modifies production.

suggested_prompts.title: Code review
suggested_prompts.message: /mor_hermes Review latest GitHub PR diff and changed files. Output REVIEW with file paths.

suggested_prompts.title: Audit PR
suggested_prompts.message: /mor_audit Audit this PR for security, correctness, and agent-safety boundaries. PASS/WARN/FAIL.

suggested_prompts.title: Codefix plan
suggested_prompts.message: /mor_codefix Diagnose issue and output FIX_PLAN + PR TEMPLATE. Human approval required.

suggested_prompts.title: Agent collab
suggested_prompts.message: /mor_collab Hermes ↔ MOR specialist dialogue on engineering topic.

slash_commands.description: MOR Finance intelligence (routes to main orchestrator)
MOR engineering snapshot — intelligence layer health (no revenue rollup)
All specialists — Slack thread with cross follow-ups
Engineering brief — ops, routes, risk, data quality
Ops / Health — API status and data freshness
Governance — proposals and voting posture
Full MOR review — spawn all specialists and synthesize
Route quality — opportunity scoring and route actions
Smart Router — execution-quality ranking by confidence
DD/Risk — borrow/lending health and safety alerts
Market observations — deployment tier classification
Liquidity Intelligence — pool depth and sizing
Capital Ladder — tier posture and allocation logic
Hermes — code review; MOR specialists respond
Hermes ↔ MOR full dialogue — specialists, mentor, synthesis
MOR Agents — Hermes and specialists collaborate
MOR Audit — code audit discussion by agents
MOR GitHub events channel status
